overall_notes: Great athleticism and a great growth mindset. Bianca is not just open to feedback — she's happy to hear it and applies corrections right away, with the attitude of someone who genuinely wants to be great at this. Positive energy throughout every drill. She learns fast and already made real progress in this first session. Translating mechanics from drills into other contexts takes time and consistency, and that's completely normal at this stage. I look forward to keeping working with her. She's the kind of player that makes you want to train non-stop.
development_plan: Priority focus is the hip angle on approach — fixing this one root cause will carry over to passing, shooting, and finishing. Secondary focus: last step length before planting and balance loss transitioning from dribble to shot. Ball control and first touch to continue in parallel.

items.mechanics_notes: Inside-of-foot pass (HTML parity): hip angle, foot placement, knee rotation — all showing improvement.
Long ground pass: hip angle, body balance, foot placement — identified stage.
Power shot: mixed mechanics (hip showing improvement; last step, balance, foot at contact working on it).
Balance, hip angle, last step — working on it.
Balance loss and chapa / hip angle — working on it.
Dribbling: ball tightness and foot selection per direction — showing improvement.
First touch weight and direction — working on it.

mechanics.name: Hip angle on approach
mechanics.description: Approaches the ball with the hip already rotated and the knee bending early. Contact lands angled instead of flush, reducing accuracy.

history.note: Hip rotating early on approach. Contact angled, not flush. Affects accuracy.

mechanics.name: Foot placement at contact
mechanics.description: Not twisting through the ball enough at contact. Reduces both accuracy and power on the pass.

history.note: Not twisting through the foot enough at contact.

mechanics.name: Knee rotation
mechanics.description: Not rotating the knee at the appropriate moment during contact. Affects the quality and direction of the pass.

history.note: Not twisting at the appropriate moment.

mechanics.name: Hip angle on approach
mechanics.description: Same hip angle issue as the inside-of-foot pass, more pronounced at longer distances.

history.note: Same hip angle issue, more pronounced at longer distances.

mechanics.name: Body balance on approach
mechanics.description: Upper body balance breaks down on approach. Affects contact quality and consistency on longer passes.

history.note: Balance off on approach, affects consistency of contact.

mechanics.name: Foot placement at contact
mechanics.description: Not twisting through at contact — reduces power on longer passes.

history.note: Not twisting through at contact — reduces power on longer passes.

mechanics.name: Hip angle on approach
mechanics.description: Same muscle memory pattern as passing — hip rotates early and contact lands angled. Power and placement suffer.

history.note: Same muscle memory pattern as passing — hip rotates early, contact angled.

mechanics.name: Last step length before planting
mechanics.description: The last step before planting the support foot is too long. Throws off balance and reduces force transfer into the ball.

history.note: Last step too long — visible balance disruption before planting.

mechanics.name: Body balance on approach
mechanics.description: Balance breaks down on approach, especially at speed. Affects contact quality on every shot.

history.note: Balance breaks down on approach, especially at speed.

mechanics.name: Foot placement at contact
mechanics.description: Not twisting through the ball enough at contact. Reduces shot power.

history.note: Not twisting through ball enough. Reduces shot power.

mechanics.name: Balance loss transitioning from dribble
mechanics.description: Loses balance just before contact when receiving and finishing. The technique applied correctly in isolated drills doesn't carry over at speed.

history.note: Loses balance before contact. Peito de pé doesn't transfer at speed.

mechanics.name: Hip angle on approach
mechanics.description: Chapa attempts breaking down — same hip angle root cause as passing and shooting.

history.note: Chapa attempts breaking down — same hip angle root cause.

mechanics.name: Last step length before planting
mechanics.description: Last step too long, disrupting balance before contact.

history.note: Last step too long disrupting balance before contact.

mechanics.name: Balance loss transitioning from dribble
mechanics.description: Balance loss before contact in control-and-finish drill. Same pattern as dribble-to-shot.

history.note: Balance loss before contact in control-and-finish drill.

mechanics.name: Hip angle on approach
mechanics.description: Chapa finish breaking down — hip angle issue carries over from passing and shooting.

history.note: Chapa finish breaking down — hip angle issue carries over.

mechanics.name: Ball not tight to feet
mechanics.description: Touches too heavy during dribbling — hitting the ball rather than guiding it. Ball gets away during close-control sequences.

history.note: Ball getting away during sequences — touches too heavy.

mechanics.name: Foot selection per dribbling direction
mechanics.description: Not consistently using the correct foot per direction. Left foot going left, right foot going right. Direction changes must use the inside of the foot on the side being left.

history.note: Inconsistent foot selection per direction. Direction changes especially unclear.

mechanics.name: First touch weight and direction
mechanics.description: First touch too heavy and not directional enough. In the rope-bounded zone drill, she kept the ball inside less than half the time.

history.note: Less than 50% success in zone drill. Ball escaping on receive consistently.

rich_report.pending_upcoming: Lob pass · Crossing (stationary & running) · Finesse shot · One-touch finish · Juggling · Upper body balance & arm usage · Scanning · Protecting the ball · Stealing the ball
